error_signature: HTTP node does not request the next page of results
title: HTTP Node pagination not working with NextToken
symptom: The HTTP node in n8n does not fire a new request for the next page of results despite receiving a NextToken in the response.
applies_when: Using HTTP node for API requests
not_this_if: Pagination is correctly implemented with a different method
NextToken is not present in the response
root_cause: The HTTP node requires a proper expression to determine when pagination is complete. If the expression does not evaluate to a Boolean value indicating whether to continue, the node will not trigger additional requests.
fix_steps: Replace the existing Pagination Complete expression with '{{ $response.body.payload.NextToken.isEmpty() }}'
Run the workflow again to check if pagination works
agent_instruction: Update the Pagination Complete expression in the HTTP node to check if the NextToken is empty.
